name: ESP_ERR_FLASH_NOT_INITIALISED
comment: esp_flash_chip_t structure not correctly initialised by esp_flash_init().

name: ESP_ERR_FLASH_UNSUPPORTED_HOST
comment: Requested operation isn't supported via this host SPI bus (chip->spi field).

name: ESP_ERR_FLASH_UNSUPPORTED_CHIP
comment: Requested operation isn't supported by this model of SPI flash chip.

name: ESP_ERR_FLASH_PROTECTED
comment: Write operation failed due to chip's write protection being enabled.
